loading_message: Welcome! Enjoy seamless streaming of your favorite content. We're here to bring entertainment to your fingertips with a professional and user-friendly experience.
playlist_url: Playlist URL, or Host URL (For XC case)
subtitle: Subtitles
adjust_subtitle_time_desc: Adjust the subtitle timing offset to sync subtitles with the video.
empty-notifications: There are no notifications to show.
change_language_desc: Select your preferred language for menus, navigation, and on-screen text.
hide_categories_desc: Choose which content categories (Adult, Sports, etc.) you want to hide from the main interface.
select_categories_you_want_to_hide: Select the categories you want to hide
theme_desc: Switch between various backgrounds for the app to match your viewing environment or personal style.
parent_control_desc: Restrict access to specific content with a PIN code to ensure a safe viewing experience for kids.
parental-status-info: Parental control is currently turned off. To enable it, you can set a password, which will restrict access to adult content using a PIN code.
clear_cache_desc: Free up storage and resolve playback issues by clearing temporary app data. This will reset all the settings, favorites, and watching progress. The app will restart to apply these changes.
cache_clear_desc: Free up storage and resolve playback issues by clearing temporary app data. This will reset all the settings, favorites, and watching progress. The app will restart to apply these changes.
clear_watch_lists_desc: Remove all saved items from your Continue Watching categories.
clear_watch_desc: Remove all saved items from your Continue Watching categories.
subtitle_settings_desc: Adjust subtitles size and background color.
font_size_desc: Customize the font size for the app interface text for better readability.
stream_format_desc: Change the format of streaming, supporting many extensions.
toggle_tmdb_desc: Enable or disable TMDB integration for enriched metadata like movie posters, descriptions, and cast info.
toggle_home_favorites_desc: Show or hide your live channels favorites item on the home screen for quick access to saved content.
live_initialization_desc: Control which live channel/category is selected by default on Live TV page startup.
live_layout_desc: Choose the layout style for the Live TV page.
smart_proxy_desc: Enable or customize Stararcs Proxy to improve stream loading and bypass regional restrictions. Choose the mode that best suits your connection and server location.
proxy-sub-instructions: This device does not have an active Stararcs proxy subscription.
load_on_demand_desc: Load content categories only when selected instead of all at once, reducing startup time.
app_initialization_desc: Choose how you want the application to start.
keyboard_type_desc: Choose how text input works. App Keyboard uses the built-in on-screen keyboard. System Keyboard allows your device's native keyboard and smart features (e.g. Samsung SmartThings) to work alongside it.
error_password_min_4: Password must be at least 4 digits
error_cannot_move_search_all: You cannot move Search All Channels.
error_subtitle_download: Something went wrong downloading subtitles for this language. Please try again later.
error_quota_exceeded: You have used all your quota.
error_no_subscription: We couldn't find an active subscription.
error_channel_protected: Adding protected content to favourites is not allowed.
error_min_1_playlist: You need to have at least 1 playlist
no_catchup_available: No catch up available for current playlist
change_playlist_try_again: Change the playlist and try again.
theme_requires_tmdb: Theme cannot be changed unless TMDB is allowed in settings.
world_cup_empty_msg: To add one, select a channel, press Fav, then choose "My World Cup".
success_subscribed: You are now subscribed to the service
login_description: Stream an extensive collection of movies, series, and live TV on any device, designed for your ultimate viewing pleasure. Elevate your experience with customizable playlists and secure parental controls.
trial_notice_body: Your complimentary trial ends in {days} days.
trial_thank_you: Thank you for choosing us to bring your entertainment to life.
